{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230452087B987E52B7E17B6E55FB"}"},"total":917},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7532441662015947545","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级好看，主角很聪明，到后面个个大佬都宠着他，太爽了，不管黑的白的全都达成共识看着他，虽然无cp 但不妨碍我后面磕cp磕的天花乱坠[笑][笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753787628,"group_id":"7387714715419413566","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"很高兴认识你，交个朋友吧","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N57rz85aE2V67rX5/57kZ6jTpe888PC60kfqciFousDX","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1b3cc3f8b96945d8a237148e743cfcf2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788540&x-signature=oE%2FZSi9z9RYoHjzIbl3e4lWH89I%3D","user_id":"3369352038194519","user_name":"阿雁o"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3369352038194519","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7387714715419413566","book_info":{"abstract":"（无系统，无女主，不无敌，偏日常，柯南体质，大小案都有）
（避雷：主角一切只为自己，非正统好人，介意勿进，还有就是，无女主≠无女配，只是没有暧昧戏码，不想看到女人出现勿进）
别人穿越机缘人脉招手就来，陆辞穿越只有局子向他招手。
鬼知道为了赚钱写的悬疑小说能被当成嫌疑人，如果知道，他依旧会写，因为穷。
运气来了挡都挡不住，坏运气也是，帮警察破个案，钱还没拿到，自行车还被偷了，给他本就不富裕的生活更加雪上加霜。
能怎么办，继续写小说呗。
没灵感？没灵感好办，跟着警察现场学习，总归是能找到点嫌疑人的可取之处的。
怎么抓人？想法一二三任你挑选，总有一款适合你。
没想到帮的多了，被大佬盯上了，陆辞表示，如果智商在这里不好使的话，他还会点拳脚。
某队长：要不是查清楚了这小子没案底，我高低得让他蹲几年。
他能将所有都计划进去，包括他自己。
又或者说，在他见到某个人的第一眼，就已经处在他计划之中了，被迫或者是危险，谁又说得准是不是他计划好的呢？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/17d37cdebabfeef8cd7a73e18b0acfa0","author":"桔九织","author_id":"","book_id":"7387714715419413566","book_name":"谁说我向着警察，我向着利益","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7387715108224369214","read_count":"15223","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1026081"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"511","tags":"悬疑灵异,穿越,推理,无女主,破案,无后宫,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a6e965ae92b4d54454b0b47529ddcbb2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779396728&x-signature=nRjm47NtelMmFs8VQjali13ifiU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4300919774387031","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"260"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230452087B987E52B7E17B6E55FB"
